description: Configure Tor Browser's embedded tor daemon to host the local python web server (currently running on 127.0.0.1:8080) as an Onion Service. Use /home/ga/Documents/local_onion/ (with 700 permissions) as the hidden service directory and update the torrc configuration file to expose the local server on port 80. Once the service is active, retrieve the generated .onion address from the hostname file, navigate to it within Tor Browser, and bookmark the resulting 'Secure Drop Site' page with the title 'Local Drop Site Test'.
